name: M:GTA.UI.TextElement.GetStringWidth(System.String,GTA.UI.Font,System.Single)
summary: Measures how many pixels in the horizontal axis the string will use when drawn
returns: The amount of pixels scaled on a 1280 pixel width base

params.name: text
params.description: The string of text to measure.

params.name: scale
params.description: Sets a sclae value for increasing or decreasing the size of the text, default value 1.0f - no scaling.
